rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MICHAEL COOMBS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Post Judgment Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 23, 2013, line 1. PETITIONER MICHAEL COOMBS, TAMARA WOODS Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Post Judgment Interrogatories. GRANTED. Respondents shall provide responses to post judgment interrogatories without objections within 10 days of notice of entry of order by personal delivery to Petitioner's counsel. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $660 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CONSTANCE BOURGES VS. DANY SCHER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Correct Intentional Or Unintentional Court/And Or Clerical Errors And Omissions That Damaged Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 23, 2013, line 4. CCP 473(d) is not applicable to Plaintiff's arguments. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Andm Otion For Protective Order To Limit Written Discovery Propounded By Ptlf
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 23, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order To Limit Written Discovery Propounded By Plaintiff. GRANTED as follows: (1)Plaintiff must pick no more than ten of the following requests for admissions from his Requests for Admissions - Truth of Facts, Set Two: Request Nos. 9 through 14, 24 through 29, 30 through 66, & 81 through 101. Prana Eight shall only be required to answer the ten chosen by Plaintiff; (2) Prana Eight need not respond to or produce documents in response to any of Plaintiff's Requests for Production - Set Two, except for the following requests: Request Nos. 21 through 24, 26, 28, 30, 32, 33 through 36, 41 through 65, and 70 through 74; (3) Prana Eight need not respond to any of Plaintiff's Requests for Admissions - Genuineness of Documents, Set Two, except for the following requests: Request Nos. 1 through 8, 11 through 25, 27 through 34, 80 through 83, 86, and 98 through 104. And (4) Prana Eight need not respond to any of Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories - Set Two, except for Form Interrogatory 17.1 with respect to denials made by Prana Eight of the no more than ten requests for admissions chosen by Plaintiff from the list given in Paragraph A, above. = (501/REQ)
